commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh In that day will I make the governors of Judah like a hearth of fire among the wood, and like a torch of fire in sheaves; and they shall devour all the people round about, on the right hand and on the left: and Jerusalem shall be inhabited again in her own place, even in Jerusalem. Septuagint, "firebrand among wood, and as a burning lamp amid straw. "(Haydock) Left. The Samaritans shall fall as well as the Idumeans. The temple and city had been deserted, while the troops of Epiphanes occupied the citadel, 1 Machabees iii.
